title: pixelsmasher13/platypus
summary: Platypus is one app you need to organize your data. Note-taker, meeting transcriber and knowledge management, written in Rust. Easily add notes, transcribe meetings, cut and paste docs, and organize into projects with a single click. Then polish notes or query your knowledge with LLM of your choice. All data stays local, use your own LLM API.

title: fahmiwol/sidix
summary: Free & Open Source AI Agent — Self-Hosted, Self-Learning, No Vendor API. Qwen2.5-7B + LoRA. 35 tools. Built on Islamic Epistemology (IHOS).

title: abalmasum785/proxmoxbar-macos
summary: 🖥️ Elevate your Proxmox VE experience on macOS with ProxmoxBar, a seamless menu bar companion for easy access and management.

title: eliasepro/groq-pdf-chat
summary: 📄 Chat with PDF files effortlessly using Groq PDF Chat; harness cloud speed and local processing for quick, cost-effective document interaction.

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: Rust AI agent where every context token earns its place. Self-learning skills, temporal graph memory, cascade quality   routing, OWASP AI security. Hybrid inference: Ollama · Claude · Gemini · OpenAI · GGUF. MCP + ACP. One binary.

title: Dia1n1a/AI-Summarizer
summary: 🛠️ Summarize text, audio, and video content efficiently with our AI-powered multimodal system for quick, concise insights.

title: Toommo2/Text2CAD
summary: 🚀 Convert natural language to real CAD artifacts with Text2CAD, an agent-driven system for deterministic and validated engineering workflows.

title: Retamoso23/ollixir
summary: 🤖 Enable local large language models with Ollixir, the Elixir client mirroring the ollama-python library for seamless chat, generation, and model management.

title: AsadKhan05/WeChat-AI-Bot-Java-Python
summary: 🤖 Build a local AI chatbot for WeChat using Java, Python, and MySQL, featuring advanced emotional support and complete data privacy.

title: chaks/personal-wiki
summary: A local AI-powered chat assistant that queries a persistent knowledge wiki built from your documents. Ingests PDFs, URLs, and markdown via Docling, extracts entities/concepts with LLMs, indexes in Qdrant for semantic search, and serves a chat UI—all running offline with Ollama. Inspired by Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.

summary: 📄 Simplify document search and Q&A with a complete RAG system, enabling smart retrieval and generation using local LLM models.

summary: 🤖 Analyze communication patterns and generate actionable insights for workplace situations with the Intent Sentiment Assistant, prioritizing privacy and efficiency.

title: greg-gzillion/clawpack_v2
summary: 🦞 Unified AI Agent Ecosystem with Common Chronicle-inspired knowledge indexing. 15+ specialized agents for documents, diagrams, blockchain, math, translation, and more.
